input.question: How many students enrolled per year at the university?

payload.question: How many students enrolled per year at the university?

output.sql:
WITH yearly_enrollments AS (
  SELECT
    student_id,
    CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date) AS INTEGER) AS enrollment_year
  FROM students
  WHERE enrollment_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  enrollment_year AS enrollment_year,
  COUNT(student_id) AS student_count
FROM yearly_enrollments
GROUP BY enrollment_year
ORDER BY enrollment_year ASC;

visualization.description: Number of students enrolled per year
visualization.title: Students Enrolled Per Year

payload.sql:
WITH yearly_enrollments AS (
  SELECT
    student_id,
    CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date) AS INTEGER) AS enrollment_year
  FROM students
  WHERE enrollment_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  enrollment_year AS enrollment_year,
  COUNT(student_id) AS student_count
FROM yearly_enrollments
GROUP BY enrollment_year
ORDER BY enrollment_year ASC;
